mapper.select: SELECT tpi.*, sf.file_id as file_id, sc.minor_nm as usage_type_nm FROM esg.tb_process_info tpi -- 파일 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = tpi.process_id and sf.target_type='process' AND sf.comp_id = #{compId} -- 사용처 시스템 코드 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d sc ON tpi.usage_type = sc.minor_cd AND sc.major_cd = 'C0010' WHERE 1=1 AND tpi.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY tpi.use_yn DESC, tpi.ord_seq ASC

SELECT tpi.*, sf.file_id as file_id FROM esg.tb_process_info tpi -- 파일 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = tpi.process_id and sf.target_type='process' AND sf.comp_id = #{compId} WHERE 1=1 AND tpi.process_id = #{searchText}
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(process_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as process_id from esg.tb_process_info where process_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_process_info ( comp_id, process_id, process_nm, usage_type, ord_seq, remark, created_at, created_by, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{processId}, #{processNm}, #{usageType}, #{ordSeq}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{useYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_process_info SET process_nm = #{processNm}, usage_type = #{usageType}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, remark = #{remark}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE process_id = #{processId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_process_info WHERE 1=1 AND process_id = #{processId}
SELECT * FROM esg.tb_process_work_cnfm tpwc WHERE 1=1 AND tpwc.process_id = #{processId} ORDER BY tpwc.use_yn DESC, tpwc.rev_no DESC

SELECT tpwc.prcs_cnfm_id, tpwc.rev_no, tpwc.process_id, tpwc.cnfm_at, tpwc.cnfm_yn, tpwc.use_yn as rev_use_yn, tpwc.cnfm_by, tpw.* FROM esg.tb_process_work_cnfm tpwc LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work tpw on tpwc.prcs_cnfm_id = tpw.prcs_cnfm_id WHERE 1=1 AND tpwc.process_id = #{processId} AND tpwc.cnfm_yn = 'Y' AND tpw.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY tpw.ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(current_date, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(rev_no FROM 10)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 4, '0') AS revNo FROM esg.tb_process_work_cnfm WHERE SUBSTRING(rev_no FROM 1 FOR 8) = TO_CHAR(current_date, 'YYYYMMDD') and process_id = #{processId}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_process_work_cnfm ( prcs_cnfm_id, rev_no, process_id, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( (select coalesce(max(prcs_cnfm_id)+1, 1) as prcsCnfmId from esg.tb_process_work_cnfm), #{revNo}, #{processId}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} );
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_process_work_cnfm SET cnfm_yn = #{cnfmYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, cnfm_by = CASE WHEN #{cnfmYn} = 'N' THEN NULL ELSE #{updatedBy} END, cnfm_at = CASE WHEN #{cnfmYn} = 'N' THEN NULL ELSE now() END WHERE process_id = #{processId} AND rev_no = #{revNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT (coalesce(max(prcs_work_id)+1, 1)) :: VARCHAR as prcsWorkId FROM esg.tb_process_work
INSERT INTO esg.tb_process_work ( prcs_work_id, prcs_cnfm_id, work_content, work_desc, ord_seq, created_at, created_by, use_yn ) VALUES ( CAST(#{prcsWorkId} AS BIGINT), CAST(#{prcsCnfmId} AS BIGINT), #{workContent}, #{workDesc}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{useYn} );
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_process_work SET work_content = #{workContent}, work_desc = #{workDesc}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE prcs_work_id = CAST(#{prcsWorkId} AS BIGINT)
UPDATE esg.tb_process_work_cnfm SET rev_nm = #{revNm}, use_yn = #{revUseYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE prcs_cnfm_id = CAST(#{prcsCnfmId} AS BIGINT)
mapper.select: SELECT tpwc.rev_no, tpwc.process_id, tpwc.cnfm_at, tpwc.cnfm_yn, tpwc.use_yn as rev_use_yn, tpwc.cnfm_by, tpw.*, tpi.process_nm FROM esg.tb_process_work_map tpwm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work tpw on tpwm.prcs_work_id = tpw.prcs_work_id INNER JOIN esg.tb_process_work_cnfm tpwc on tpw.prcs_cnfm_id = tpwc.prcs_cnfm_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_info tpi on tpwm.process_id = tpi.process_id WHERE 1=1 AND tpwm.target_id = #{targetId} AND tpwm.target_type = #{targetType} AND tpwm.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY tpwc.process_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_process_work_map ( target_type, target_id, prcs_work_id, process_id, created_at, created_by, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, CAST(#{id} AS BIGINT), #{processId}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{useYn} )
